'''thamuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvulotome|uvulotome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvulotome|uvulotome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thamuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæmiyith|thæmiyith]] || [[word:thæmiyij|thæmiyij]] || [[word:thæmiyish|thæmiyish]] || [[word:thæmiyi|thæmiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thamumuyuth|thamumuyuth]] || [[word:thamumuyuj|thamumuyuj]] || [[word:thamumuyush|thamumuyush]] || [[word:thamumuyu|thamumuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamuyuth|thamuyuth]] || [[word:thamuyuj|thamuyuj]] || [[word:thamuyush|thamuyush]] || [[word:thamuyu|thamuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamufyuth|thamufyuth]] || [[word:thamufyuj|thamufyuj]] || [[word:thamufyush|thamufyush]] || [[word:thamufyuf|thamufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thamuyuthu|thamuyuthu]] || [[word:thamuyuju|thamuyuju]] || [[word:thamuyushu|thamuyushu]] || [[word:thamuyuku|thamuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thamuyuth|thamuyuth]] || [[word:thamuyuj|thamuyuj]] || [[word:thamuyush|thamuyush]] || [[word:thamuyu|thamuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thamuyuthul|thamuyuthul]] || [[word:thamuyujul|thamuyujul]] || [[word:thamuyushul|thamuyushul]] || [[word:thamuyukul|thamuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thamuyuthuthu|thamuyuthuthu]] || [[word:thamuyujuju|thamuyujuju]] || [[word:thamuyushushu|thamuyushushu]] || [[word:thamuyuku|thamuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thamuyuthun|thamuyuthun]] || [[word:thamuyujun|thamuyujun]] || [[word:thamuyushun|thamuyushun]] || [[word:thamuyukun|thamuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thamuyuthuoro|thamuyuthuoro]] || [[word:thamuyujuoro|thamuyujuoro]] || [[word:thamuyushuoro|thamuyushuoro]] || [[word:thamuyukuoro|thamuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
